titleStmt.title: SII 8.613: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 613. (A.R. No. 304 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi va
ḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum
poṟceyap pāvaiyuñ
cīrttanic celviyun ta
n perunteviyarāki Iṉpu
ṟa neṭutiya lūḻiyu ḷiṭai
tuṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉa
valippaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ
cuḷḷiccuḻmatiḷ ko
ḷḷippākkayāmRead kkaiyum.naṇṇa
ṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭa
kkamum porukaṭal Ī(ḻ)ḻat
taraicartamuṭiyum Āṅkavan
teviyar roṅkeḻil muṭi
yum muṉṉavarpakkal te
ṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyum Intiranāramum teṇṭirai Īḻa
maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eripaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum
kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkati
rvelait tolperuṅkāvaṟa palpaḻantivum ceruviṟ cinavil I
rupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracūrāman melvaruñ cāntimaṟṟi
varaṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimi
ka muyaṅkiyil mutikiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉa (na)ḷapperumpuka(ḻ)ḻoṭu
piṭiyal liraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum nava(ṉ)netikkulap perumalai
kaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavalla mutūRead maturaº.maṇṭalamum
kāmiṭaivaḷar nāmākkoṇaimuRead nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum.veñcilaivirap pañcappaḷiyum pāca
ṭaipaḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvi
l vaṇkirtti yātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉ tolkulat tintri rataṉai vi
ḷaiyamarkkaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palatanattoṭu niṟaiku
latanakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimuṉai yoṭṭaviṣai yamum pūcirā(l) ceru na
rkkocamanāṭu n=ta nmaRead kocalaināṭu.pālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟucolait ta
ṇṭa puttiyum Iraṇacūrakaṉ mura(ṇ)ṇuṟat tākkit tikkaṉaikirttit takkaṇalāṭamum
kovinda ccantaṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta(l)cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum to
ṭukaḻaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭal mayirp pālaṉaiRead mahipālaṉai.veñcamarviḷākat taiñcuvi
(vi)ttaruḷi yoṇṭiṟaliyāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭaāramum nittalaneṭuṅ
kaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalartirttatteṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Āḻkaṭa
lnaṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅkapaṉmanākiya ki (ki)ṭāra
ttaraiyaṉai vākaiyamporukaṭal kumpakkariyo ṭakappaṭut turimaiyi
lp piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamum Ārttavaṉ naka(r)e(ka)p porttoḻil vācalil
viccātirarttoraṇamum mottoḷip punamaṇipputa(l)vamuṅ kanamaṇikkatavamu ni
raiśrīviṣai yamum tuṟainīrp paṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyūreyiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum
Āḻkaṭalakaḻ Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟuniṟai
vaḷaippantūṟum toṭukaṭaṟkāvaṟ (kṭa)kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māp�
koṇṭa kopparakecari
panma rākiya Uṭaiyār śrīrājentr(ā) coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu
21Āvatu keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu
brahmade yam Īcānamaṅkalattu sabhai yom Eṅkaḷū
r tiruccentuṟaiuṭaiya ma hāde var śrīpaṇṭārat
tu caṇḍesvaradeva śrīasta ttāl nāṅkaḷ ko
ṇṭa poṉ kuṭiñaikkallāl niṟai 10 5 Ippo
ṉ 10 5- ṉaiñ kaḻaiñciṉālum kācu Oṉṟukkup po
ṉ maiñcāṭiyum kuṉṟiyāka vanta kuṟṟamaṟṟa Aṉṟāṭu naṟ
kācu Āka nakkācu Iruṉūṟukkum śantrā tittaval Ep(�)
p(o)ṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum Iṟuttum kāttum kuṭuppomāka viṭṭa ni
lamāvatu . Ivvūr vācciyaṉ kaṇṭaṉ civaññāṉasa mpa
ntanavaṭikaḷum Ivan tāy vācciyaṉ Oṟṟikaṇṭaṉ brāhma
ṇi ma yanaṅkaiyum Ittiruccentuṟaiuṭaiya ma
hāde var śrīkoyilil tiruvārātitta brāhma ṇarai Ūṭṭac cā
lābho ka(m)māka śaṇḍeśva rade var śrīasta tte Ivarkaḷ niro
ṭu Aṭṭikkuṭutta nila(m)māvatu kiya
kili mātevivāykkāThe record is incomplete.
Three fragments close to this read as follows:—

centuṟaiuṭaiya ma hā
ṭaiya nilam Araikkāṇi
coḻavitiyil
ṉai nilamāka ma
Uṭpaṭa Aiñ
� I
mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi munti
kaḷ cālābho kamāka niroṭua
l Ipponnāl vanta kā
kuuṭalāka śaṇḍeśvaraje
irājap pāṇṭināṭṭuk
kaikayinallūrk kaṭṭika
yāna veṇkāṭaṉ coḻama
kācu 8 10- m Ivvūrttalai
n cūṟṟiyāna tirunili A

tta kācu 4 10- m Ivvūrai
Amaṇkuṭi veḷḷāṉ
kuṭutta kācu 4 10- m Ivvū
tāyan śūri yan pirāntakan I
mmār kuṭutta kācu Irunūṟu
ṇṇāval pūntoṭṭattu
tāṭṭattukkum Ivvūr masyaddhaRead madhyastha.
n Aiyparuṭaibrahma maṅka
citākan vikkiramakesa ri
ra n tirunantavānattukkum yip
lukku vaṭakkum kāccuvan mānā
ṭārnilattukku kiḻakkum ceṉ
m naṭuvupaṭṭa śaṇḍeśva raviḷā
tavar tānattilu sabhai yom vi
llūruṭaiyāṉ veṇkāṭa

Iṭṭu vetam valla brāhma ṇar nicatam Oṉpatu kalam Uttamākkiramāka Uṇṇak kalam 1- nukku ni
cata I 3� nāḷ ḷonṟukku cūlakkālāl I � dhā Āṇṭuvarai Iśaṇḍeśvara- viḷākattāl I 100 2 10 Eḻumāka Āṇṭuvarai I
2 100 5 10- ḷattukkum Iṉnilam cālābho kamākak kuṭuttu Itināl vanta Iṟai Eccoṟu veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ cantrā tittaval Epperppaṭ
kkal Ūṭṭivippatānom sabh Aiyom . tiruvaṭipaṇiyālum Ivūr Uṟuppuṭṭur Anan=ta vāmanakkiramavittanum kāmakkāṇi vasu
tiruvaraṅka sā hasr(ā) ṉum Ātr Aiyan so made vaṉ caṅkaranaārāyaṇanum mokiliyan bhāskara ṉ śrīkṛṣṇa num paṇiyāl paṇikka Appaṇi ke
ṭṭu Eḻutineṉ Ivvūrk kāvitimaiyum kaṇakkum śāsa napba ttam piṟantuṭaiya Ivvūr maddhyastha ṉ Ivvūrk karaṇattān nicā
kāmakkāṇi centan kāpāli paṇiyālum
Digital edition of SII 8.613 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
